summary: Defense Program Management leader with 16+ years of Pakistan Air Force experience across JF-17 Thunder and SAAB 2000 Erieye AEW&C programs. Progressed from Assistant Director to Deputy Director PMO, coordinating multi-stakeholder programs between CADI (China), SAAB (Sweden), PAC Kamra manufacturing, and operational squadrons. PMI-ACP certified with a strong engineering foundation in avionics integration and weapons systems.

experience.title: Deputy Director, Program Management Office — JF-17 Aircraft
bullets: Directed senior-level program management for JF-17 Thunder production lots, modification programs, and export coordination
Managed engineering change proposals, resource allocation, and technical baselines across multiple concurrent work packages
Coordinated flight test campaigns, weapons integration trials, and certification activities with cross-functional teams
Oversaw export variant coordination for international customers including Myanmar and Nigeria

experience.title: Assistant Director, Program Management Office — JF-17 Aircraft
bullets: Coordinated program activities between CADI (OEM designer), PAC Kamra (manufacturing partner), and field squadrons
Tracked milestones across avionics integration, weapons systems qualification, and airframe production schedules
Managed configuration control for indigenous systems including mission computer and AESA radar integration efforts
Maintained budget tracking, contractor deliverable oversight, and schedule risk assessments

experience.title: PMO Officer, AEW&C Aircraft
bullets: Managed program activities for SAAB 2000 Erieye AEW&C fleet sustainment (9 aircraft)
Coordinated with SAAB (Sweden) on maintenance contracts, spare parts logistics, and obsolescence management
Tracked fleet availability metrics and mission readiness reporting for senior leadership

experience.title: Aerospace Systems Integration Lead
bullets: Led avionics and weapons systems integration for JF-17 Thunder Block III at CADI in Chengdu, China
Facilitated cross-cultural engineering collaboration between Pakistani and Chinese technical teams
Supported flight test campaigns for weapons integration and avionics qualification milestones

certifications: Google Project Management Professional Certificate (6 courses)
Engineering Project Management Specialization — Rice University (38 PDUs)
